title: Call the Mesquiteers
writer: Luci Ward, Bernard McConville, William Colt MacDonald
actors: Robert Livingston, Ray Corrigan, Max Terhune
plot: Smugglers hijack the Mesquiteers truck, but the police catch up, kill the smugglers, and then try to arrest the Mesquiteers as part of the gang. They escape but now have to prove their innocence while being hunted as wanted men.
